text.title: Vision Applications — Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure for a VLM task service call: route task → validate size → cache probe → call → parse → normalize → route to review or auto-action.

step.name: route-task
step.input: incoming request (image source, task_type, optional categories / policy_categories / schema)
step.action: Walk `content/06-decision-tree.xml`. Pick task handler (document / classify / moderate) and provider (Claude / GPT-4o / Gemini Flash).

step.name: validate-size
step.action: For URL: HEAD check (rule fm-02). For local: stat size. Reject > provider cap. Reject unsupported formats. Resize to 1024px long edge.
step.decision-gate: oversize after resize → return status="error", error="image too large".

step.name: cache-probe
step.input: image bytes, task params (categories / policy / schema), provider, model
step.action: cache_key = sha256(bytes + json(task_params) + provider + model); probe `{cache_dir}/{cache_key}.json`; return cached=true on hit.

step.name: vlm-call
step.input: encoded image, task-specific prompt with schema, provider, model, detail level
step.action: Set `detail="auto"` default, `"high"` only for document task. Set `response_format={"type": "json_object"}` for OpenAI. Pass categories / policy_categories as text in prompt.

step.name: parse
step.input: raw response, Pydantic model per task
step.action: Parse JSON; validate against task-specific Pydantic. On JSONDecodeError / ValidationError, re-prompt with the error message; cap retries=2.

step.name: normalize
step.action: Lowercase severity / category. For classify, verify category ∈ supplied list. For moderate, compute `needs_human_review = confidence < 0.7 OR severity in {medium, high}`.

step.name: route-to-action-or-review
step.action: If `needs_human_review` → write to review queue with image_id + result. Else → route to auto-action handler. Persist cache_key + result JSON.
step.output: side-effect: review queue entry OR auto-action triggered.
